rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit unsafe Boolean range comparisons unless port is explicitly AGREE bool
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and validation repair patterns
